name: ARTS WAY MANUFACTURING CO INC
summary: Arts-Way Manufacturing Co., Inc. is a Delaware corporation founded in 1956, headquartered in Armstrong, Iowa. It operates two segments: Agricultural Products, manufacturing farm equipment including feed mills, manure spreaders, forage equipment, bale processors, sugar beet harvesters, and dirt work equipment sold under the Arts-Way brand through ~500 dealers in the US, Canada, Australia, Japan, and UK; and Modular Buildings, producing custom modular research facilities and animal containment buildings through subsidiary Arts-Way Scientific, Inc. in Monona, Iowa.

products.name: Feed Mills / Grinder Mixers
products.description: Stationary and portable hammer and roller mills for livestock feed processing and breweries.

products.name: Manure Spreaders (X Series)
products.description: Vertical beater spreaders with guillotine slop gate controls and optional Raven-powered automatic rate control.

products.name: Forage Equipment (2100 Series)
products.description: Forage boxes, bale processors, running gear, and dump boxes with 100% in-cab controls.

products.name: Bale Processors (TOP-SPREAD)
products.description: Patented loader-mounted spreader for round or square bales, attachable to skid steer, telehandler, or tractor.

products.name: Dirt Work Equipment
products.description: Single blade and folding land planes with patented floating hitch design, and standard or rear steer graders.

products.name: Sugar Beet Harvesting Equipment
products.description: 12-row harvester with patented grab roll bed, automatic leveling system, and defoliator for sugar beet harvest.

products.name: Modular Research Buildings
products.description: Custom-designed modular buildings for animal containment and research laboratories, sold or leased to academic, government, and private research customers.

products.name: OEM Parts
products.description: Limited original equipment manufacturer parts supplied to leading agricultural industry manufacturers.

products.name: After-Market Service Parts
products.description: Replacement parts and support services for branded Arts-Way agricultural equipment.

partnerships.description: Raven-powered automatic rate control integrated into Arts-Way X Series manure spreaders for apron speed and slop gate control.
